## QRG Capital Management discloses $1.78 million Bloom Energy stake in routine 13F filing

No material thesis implication — a $1.78M 13F from a non-prominent holder is not a meaningful positioning signal for BE; monitor only if larger or more active institutional filings emerge alongside operational news.

- QRG Capital Management filed a 13F disclosing a $1.78 million position in Bloom Energy (BE).
- The position size is small and carries no new fundamental or activist signal.
- Routine institutional disclosure; no new operational news, rating change, or strategic development accompanies this filing.
- Classifier confidence is low; story is included for completeness but is not actionable for the portfolio.
